subcodes.first_line: The lights of the Covenant have dawned resplendent, brilliant as the morn in their effulgence. Glorified be He Who maketh the Covenant, Who fulfilleth it, and Who confirmeth it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد لاحت انوار المیثاق ساطعه الفجر شدیده الاشراق سبحان العاقد و العاهد و الموکد
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
